summary_sections.title: Overview
summary_sections.content_html: Magnetic Force on Moving Charges is a key topic in Magnetism for AP Physics 2.

summary_sections.title: Key Concepts
summary_sections.content_html: This lesson covers the fundamental principles of magnetic force on moving charges.

summary_sections.title: Applications
summary_sections.content_html: Understanding magnetic force on moving charges has applications in various areas of physics and engineering.
